task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the Magento admin panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin dashboard is visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Categories management page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Categories' management page (typically found under Catalog > Categories) is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Default Category' is selected as the parent category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the category tree on the left side of the page, 'Default Category' is highlighted or selected before creating the new subcategory.

task_completion.description: Verify the new category name 'Eco-Friendly' is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Eco-Friendly' is typed into the 'Category Name' input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the category is set to be enabled and included in the menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switches for 'Enable Category' and 'Include in Menu' are both set to the 'Yes' (active) position.

task_completion.description: Verify the new category was saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'You saved the category.') is displayed at the top of the page, and 'Eco-Friendly' appears as a subcategory under 'Default Category' in the category tree.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento web GUI to create the category.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Magento web interface, not terminal commands, API scripts, or curl requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Magento application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should display the genuine Magento Admin panel, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using database tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or MySQL CLI) to directly insert records into the catalog_category_entity tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target category name is 'Eco-Friendly'. It must be created as a subcategory under 'Default Category' (which is the standard root category). Both 'Enable Category' (is_active) and 'Include in Menu' (include_in_menu) settings must be enabled (set to Yes/True).
